name: llama-index-finetuning
documentation:
# LlamaIndex Finetuning

A LlamaIndex extension package that contains classes and features for carrying
out finetuning of OpenAI LLMs and Embedding models.

modules.name: llama_index.finetuning.openai.validate_json
documentation: Validates training data and estimates token usage
We start by importing the required packages

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.openai.base.OpenAIFinetuneEngine.from_finetuning_handler
documentation:
Initialize from finetuning handler.

Used to finetune an OpenAI model into another
OpenAI model (e.g. gpt-3.5-turbo on top of GPT-4).

documentation: Convert the BaseModel instance to a JSONL string.
Class for keeping track of CohereAI Reranker finetuning training/validation Dataset.

classes.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.BaseFinetuningHandler

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.BaseFinetuningHandler.on_event_start
documentation: Run when an event starts and return id of event.

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.BaseFinetuningHandler.save_finetuning_events
documentation: Save the finetuning events to a file.

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.BaseFinetuningHandler.start_trace
documentation: Run when an overall trace is launched.

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.BaseFinetuningHandler.end_trace
documentation: Run when an overall trace is exited.

Callback handler for finetuning.

This handler will collect all messages
sent to the LLM, along with their responses.
It also defines a `get_finetuning_events` endpoint as well as a
`save_finetuning_events` endpoint.

classes.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.OpenAIFineTuningHandler

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.OpenAIFineTuningHandler.save_finetuning_events
llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.OpenAIFineTuningHandler.start_trace
documentation: Run when an overall trace is launched.

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.OpenAIFineTuningHandler.end_trace
documentation: Run when an overall trace is exited.

Callback handler for OpenAI fine-tuning.

This handler will collect all messages
sent to the LLM, along with their responses. It will then save these messages
in a `.jsonl` format that can be used for fine-tuning with OpenAI's API.

classes.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.GradientAIFineTuningHandler

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.GradientAIFineTuningHandler.save_finetuning_events
documentation:
Save the finetuning events to a file.

This saved format can be used for fine-tuning with OpenAI's API.
The structure for each json line is as follows:
{
  "inputs": "<full_prompt_str>"
},
...

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.GradientAIFineTuningHandler.start_trace
documentation: Run when an overall trace is launched.

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.GradientAIFineTuningHandler.end_trace
documentation: Run when an overall trace is exited.

Callback handler for Gradient AI fine-tuning.

This handler will collect all messages
sent to the LLM, along with their responses. It will then save these messages
in a `.jsonl` format that can be used for fine-tuning with Gradient AI's API.

classes.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.MistralAIFineTuningHandler

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.MistralAIFineTuningHandler.save_finetuning_events
llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.MistralAIFineTuningHandler.start_trace
documentation: Run when an overall trace is launched.

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.callbacks.finetuning_handler.MistralAIFineTuningHandler.end_trace
documentation: Run when an overall trace is exited.

Callback handler for MistralAI fine-tuning.

This handler will collect all messages
sent to the LLM, along with their responses. It will then save these messages
in a `.jsonl` format that can be used for fine-tuning with MistralAI's API.

functions.name: llama_index.finetuning.embeddings.common.load_existing_data
documentation:
Load existing data from a JSON file if it exists.

Args:
    path (str): The file path to load the JSON from.

Returns:
    Tuple[Dict[str, str], Dict[str, str], Dict[str, List[str]]]: The loaded queries, corpus, and relevant_docs.

functions.name: llama_index.finetuning.embeddings.common.generate_qa_embedding_pairs
documentation:
Generate QA pairs from a set of nodes and save periodically.

Args:
    nodes (List[TextNode]): List of TextNode objects to process.
    llm (LLM): The large language model to use for generating questions.
    qa_generate_prompt_tmpl (str): The template for generating QA prompts.
    num_questions_per_chunk (int): Number of questions to generate per chunk of text.
    retry_limit (int): Number of times to retry on failure.
    on_failure (str): Action to take on repeated failures ('fail' or 'continue').
    save_every (int): Number of nodes to process before saving the dataset.
    output_path (str): The file path to save the JSON output.
    verbose (bool): If True, print debugging messages.

Returns:
    EmbeddingQAFinetuneDataset: The generated dataset.

classes.name: llama_index.finetuning.embeddings.common.EmbeddingQAFinetuneDataset

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.embeddings.common.EmbeddingQAFinetuneDataset.save_json
documentation:
Save the dataset to a JSON file.

Args:
    path (str): The file path to save the JSON.

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.embeddings.common.EmbeddingQAFinetuneDataset.from_json
documentation:
Load the dataset from a JSON file.

Args:
    path (str): The file path to load the JSON from.

Returns:
    EmbeddingQAFinetuneDataset: The loaded dataset.

Embedding QA Finetuning Dataset.

Args:
    queries (Dict[str, str]): Dict id -> query.
    corpus (Dict[str, str]): Dict id -> string.
    relevant_docs (Dict[str, List[str]]): Dict query id -> list of doc ids.

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.types.BaseCrossEncoderFinetuningEngine.get_finetuned_model
documentation: Gets fine-tuned Cross-Encoder model as re-ranker.

classes.name: llama_index.finetuning.embeddings.adapter_utils.MyMultipleNegativesRankingLoss
documentation:
Multiple negatives ranking loss.

This loss is similar to the one in sentence_transformers,
but optimized for our own embeddings.

classes.name: llama_index.finetuning.embeddings.adapter.EmbeddingAdapterFinetuneEngine

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.embeddings.adapter.EmbeddingAdapterFinetuneEngine.from_model_path
documentation:
Load from model path.

Args:
    dataset (EmbeddingQAFinetuneDataset): Dataset to finetune on.
    embed_model (BaseEmbedding): Embedding model to finetune.
    model_path (str): Path to model.
    model_cls (Optional[Type[Any]]): Adapter model class. Defaults to None.
    **kwargs (Any): Additional kwargs (see __init__)

Embedding adapter finetune engine.

Args:
    dataset (EmbeddingQAFinetuneDataset): Dataset to finetune on.
    embed_model (BaseEmbedding): Embedding model to finetune.
    batch_size (Optional[int]): Batch size. Defaults to 10.
    epochs (Optional[int]): Number of epochs. Defaults to 1.
    dim (Optional[int]): Dimension of embedding. Defaults to None.
    adapter_model (Optional[BaseAdapter]): Adapter model. Defaults to None, in which
        case a linear adapter is used.
    device (Optional[str]): Device to use. Defaults to None.
    model_output_path (str): Path to save model output. Defaults to "model_output".
    model_checkpoint_path (Optional[str]): Path to save model checkpoints.
        Defaults to None (don't save checkpoints).
    verbose (bool): Whether to show progress bar. Defaults to False.
    bias (bool): Whether to use bias. Defaults to False.

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.azure_openai.base.AzureOpenAIFinetuneEngine.from_finetuning_handler
documentation:
Initialize from finetuning handler.

Used to finetune an AzureOpenAI model into another
AzureOpenAI model (e.g. gpt-4o-mini on top of gpt-4o).

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.azure_openai.base.AzureOpenAIFinetuneEngine.deploy_finetuned_model
documentation:
Deploy finetuned model.

- token: Azure AD token.
- subscription_id:      The subscription ID for the associated Azure OpenAI resource.
- resource_group:       The resource group name for your Azure OpenAI resource.
- resource_name: The Azure OpenAI resource name.
- model_deployment_name: Custom deployment name that you will use to reference the model when making inference calls.

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.azure_openai.base.AzureOpenAIFinetuneEngine.get_finetuned_model
documentation:
Get finetuned model.

- engine: This will correspond to the custom name you chose
    for your deployment when you deployed a model.

documentation: Dataset Generator for Cross Encoder Finetuning.

Initialize from finetuning handler.

Used to finetune an MistralAI model.

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.cross_encoders.cross_encoder.CrossEncoderFinetuneEngine.push_to_hub
documentation: Saves the model and tokenizer to HuggingFace hub.

methods.name: llama_index.finetuning.cross_encoders.cross_encoder.CrossEncoderFinetuneEngine.get_finetuned_model
documentation:
Loads the model from huggingface hub as re-ranker.

```
param repo_id

Huggingface Hub repo from where you want to load the model

param top_n

The value of nodes the re-ranker should filter
```
